intro: MEDICATIONS used in eye examinations and treatment.
reading: Eye drops are the primary pharmacological tool in ophthalmology, ranging from general lubricating drops to specialized dilating (mydriatic) drops used to widen the pupil for examination.

terms.example_en: The dilating drops will make your pupils widen for about four hours.
terms.example_ru: Капли для расширения зрачка подействуют примерно четыре часа.

terms.example_en: Use the eye drops twice a day.
terms.example_ru: Используйте глазные капли два раза в день.
